arts.ttl: Who are Ayden Heaven, Maldini Kacurri and Ismeal Kabia? Arsenal wonderkids on bench vs Tottenham
arts.sum: That news, in particular, has hastened the need for North London Derby reinforcements from the club's Academy, with both Ayden Heaven and Maldini Kacurri named on the bench. Here, football.london takes a closer look at Heaven, Kacurri and Kabia, while providing a profile on the three youngsters;

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Gunners 'keeping tabs' on 21-year-old La Liga starlet
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly keeping tabs on the progress of Valencia starlet Javi Guerra, who has a significant release clause in his contract.

arts.ttl: “Different class” Arsenal forward denied brilliant assist by teammate’s “really tame effort”
arts.sum: Arsenal will be hoping to pick up all three points against Tottenham Hotspur in the North London Derby today and they were handed a golden opportunity to take the lead. Belgian winger Leandro Trossard managed to set up teammate Gabriel Martinelli with an exceptional bit of play, but the Brazilian forward failed to convert the […] The post “Different class” Arsenal forward denied brilliant assist by teammate’s “really tame effort” appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Moment Arsenal mascot shoves and taunts Tottenham counterparts ahead of north London derby as Piers Morgan jokes: 'Even our mascots are harder!'
arts.sum: Arsenal's young Mascot got into the north London derby mode by shoving his Tottenham counterpart.

arts.ttl: Robin Van Persie insists he's 'not traumatised' after new Heerenveen boss suffers record 9-1 defeat in Dutch top flight as he admits he's been through it before with Arsenal's 8-2 defeat to Man United
arts.sum: The former Arsenal and Manchester United forward is in his first season as a coach of a top flight club and in his fourth match in charge saw his side suffer their biggest defeat ever at AZ Alkmaar.

arts.ttl: Spurs v Arsenal team news: Solanke starts, Odegaard misses out
arts.sum: Kick-off is at 14:00 BST The post Spurs v Arsenal team news: Solanke starts, Odegaard misses out appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Arsenal Martin Odegaard blow confirmed as Oleksandr Zinchenko absence for Tottenham explained
arts.sum: Martin Odegaard is one of several players absent as Arsenal take on Tottenham Hotspur in the North London Derby. The Gunners captain picked up an ankle injury while on international duty with Norway and was a doubt heading into the game despite Mikel Arteta's pre-match comments suggesting he could be fit.

arts.ttl: Why is Oleksandr Zinchenko missing from Arsenal squad against Tottenham?
arts.sum: Arsenal confirm that Oleksandr Zinchenko is out of the squad to face North London rivals Tottenham Hotspur due to a calf injury.

arts.ttl: Team News: Arsenal, Tottenham lineups confirmed as Martin Odegaard, Gabriel Jesus calls made
arts.sum: Arsenal captain Martin Odegaard is absent from the Gunners' squad against North London rivals Tottenham Hotspur, who welcome back Dominic Solanke and Micky van de Ven.

arts.ttl: Arsenal hype North London Derby with controversial rapper before Tottenham clash
arts.sum: Salieu released the single on Friday, his second since leaving jail after serving some 21 months of the 33-month sentence he received in December 2022. The second verse of that track includes the line, "I'm still kickin' like Bukayo Saka, which features within the film.
